get.description: Returns the webhooks configured on an account, with their secrets masked. Filter by `state` to list only the active or the inactive ones.

parameters.name: account_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the account the webhooks belong to.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Return only the webhooks in this state. Omit it to return all of them.

200.description: The webhooks configured on the account, or an empty array if it has none.

post.description: Creates a webhook in active state, subscribed to the events you select. It requires at least one trigger, and starts receiving notifications immediately.

201.description: The webhook you created. The secrets you configured come back masked, and the ones you left out come back as null.

get.description: Returns a webhook by its unique identifier, with its secrets masked.

parameters.name: webhook_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the webhook, as returned by [Create a Webhook](/reference/webhooks/create-webhook).

parameters.name: account_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the account the webhook belongs to.

patch.description: Updates a webhook. Send only the fields you want to change, including the state and any rotated secret.

parameters.name: webhook_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the webhook, as returned by [Create a Webhook](/reference/webhooks/create-webhook).

delete.description: Deletes a webhook. Yuno stops sending notifications to its URL, and returns the webhook it deleted.

parameters.name: webhook_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the webhook, as returned by [List Webhooks](/reference/webhooks/list-webhooks).

parameters.name: account_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the account the webhook belongs to.

Unauthorized.description: Your API credentials are missing or invalid.

messages: Not authenticated
Invalid Credentials
account_id is required.
Account id is invalid

InvalidListRequest.description: The `account_id` is missing or invalid, or `state` is not `ACTIVE` or `INACTIVE`.

messages: account_id is required.
state must be ACTIVE or INACTIVE.
Account id is invalid

InvalidCreateRequest.description: The request is invalid. The `code` tells you which rule it broke.

messages: account_id, name and url are required.
at least one trigger is required.
One or more webhook triggers are invalid.
OAuth2 configuration is incomplete or inconsistent.
renewal_days is only valid when subscription_triggers contains CLOSE_TO_RENEWAL
Account id is invalid
The webhook url is not allowed; it must resolve to a public, routable address.

InvalidUpdateRequest.description: The request is invalid. The `code` tells you which rule it broke.

messages: account_id is required.
state must be ACTIVE or INACTIVE.
renewal_days and clear_renewal_days cannot be set together.
One or more webhook triggers are invalid.
OAuth2 configuration is incomplete or inconsistent.
renewal_days is only valid when subscription_triggers contains CLOSE_TO_RENEWAL
Account id is invalid
The webhook url is not allowed; it must resolve to a public, routable address.

WebhookNotFound.description: There is no webhook with that identifier on the account.

messages: The webhook does not exist for this account.

WebhookConflict.description: The account already has a webhook with that name, or one with the same URL that listens to one of the same events.

messages: A webhook with the same name, or url and trigger(s), already exists for this account.

UpstreamError.description: The webhook service is temporarily unavailable.

messages: The webhook service is temporarily unavailable.

account_id.description: The unique identifier of the account the webhook belongs to.

name.description: Your name for the webhook. It must be unique within the account.

url.description: The endpoint Yuno sends the notifications to. It must be an `http` or `https` URL that resolves to a public, routable address.

api_key.description: Sent to your endpoint as the `x-api-key` header on every delivery.

secret.description: Sent to your endpoint as the `x-secret` header on every delivery.

hmac_client_secret.description: The key Yuno signs the payload with. The signature travels in the `x-hmac-signature` header.

oauth2_authentication_url.description: Your token endpoint. It must use HTTPS. Send `oauth2_authentication_url`, `oauth2_client_id`, `oauth2_client_secret` and `oauth2_grant_type` together.

oauth2_client_id.description: The client identifier Yuno authenticates with. Send `oauth2_authentication_url`, `oauth2_client_id`, `oauth2_client_secret` and `oauth2_grant_type` together.

oauth2_client_secret.description: The client secret Yuno authenticates with. Send `oauth2_authentication_url`, `oauth2_client_id`, `oauth2_client_secret` and `oauth2_grant_type` together.

oauth2_grant_type.description: The grant type Yuno requests the token with. Send `oauth2_authentication_url`, `oauth2_client_id`, `oauth2_client_secret` and `oauth2_grant_type` together.

oauth2_authorization_name.description: The header Yuno sends the token in. Defaults to `Authorization`.

oauth2_include_client_id.description: Send the client identifier as a header on the token request as well.

enrollment_triggers.description: The enrollment events the webhook subscribes to.

payment_triggers.description: The payment events the webhook subscribes to.

report_triggers.description: The report events the webhook subscribes to.

subscription_triggers.description: The subscription events the webhook subscribes to.

onboarding_triggers.description: The onboarding events the webhook subscribes to.

renewal_days.description: How many days before a renewal Yuno sends the `CLOSE_TO_RENEWAL` notification. It must be 1 or more, and it is valid only when `subscription_triggers` contains `CLOSE_TO_RENEWAL`.

account_id.description: The unique identifier of the account the webhook belongs to.

name.description: Your name for the webhook. It must be unique within the account.

state.description: Set it to `INACTIVE` to stop the deliveries while keeping the configuration, and back to `ACTIVE` to resume them.

url.description: The endpoint Yuno sends the notifications to. It must be an `http` or `https` URL that resolves to a public, routable address.

api_key.description: Replaces the `x-api-key` Yuno sends on every delivery.

secret.description: Replaces the `x-secret` Yuno sends on every delivery.

hmac_client_secret.description: Replaces the key Yuno signs the payload with.

oauth2_authentication_url.description: Your token endpoint. It must use HTTPS. Send `oauth2_authentication_url`, `oauth2_client_id`, `oauth2_client_secret` and `oauth2_grant_type` together.

oauth2_client_id.description: The client identifier Yuno authenticates with. Send `oauth2_authentication_url`, `oauth2_client_id`, `oauth2_client_secret` and `oauth2_grant_type` together.

oauth2_client_secret.description: The client secret Yuno authenticates with. Send `oauth2_authentication_url`, `oauth2_client_id`, `oauth2_client_secret` and `oauth2_grant_type` together.

oauth2_grant_type.description: The grant type Yuno requests the token with. Send `oauth2_authentication_url`, `oauth2_client_id`, `oauth2_client_secret` and `oauth2_grant_type` together.

oauth2_scope.description: The scope Yuno requests the token with.

oauth2_authorization_name.description: The header Yuno sends the token in. Defaults to `Authorization`.

oauth2_include_client_id.description: Send the client identifier as a header on the token request as well.

enrollment_triggers.description: Replaces the enrollment events the webhook subscribes to.

payment_triggers.description: Replaces the payment events the webhook subscribes to.

report_triggers.description: Replaces the report events the webhook subscribes to.

subscription_triggers.description: Replaces the subscription events the webhook subscribes to.

onboarding_triggers.description: Replaces the onboarding events the webhook subscribes to.

renewal_days.description: How many days before a renewal Yuno sends the `CLOSE_TO_RENEWAL` notification. It must be 1 or more. Send it on its own, not together with `clear_renewal_days`.

clear_renewal_days.description: Set it to `true` to remove `renewal_days`. Send it on its own, not together with `renewal_days`.

id.description: The unique identifier of the webhook.

account_id.description: The unique identifier of the account the webhook belongs to.

state.description: `ACTIVE` webhooks receive notifications, `INACTIVE` ones do not. A webhook starts out `ACTIVE`.

url.description: The endpoint Yuno sends the notifications to.

api_key.description: Masked as `***`, or `null` when you have not configured it.

secret.description: Masked as `***`, or `null` when you have not configured it.

hmac_client_secret.description: Masked as `***`, or `null` when you have not configured it.

oauth2_client_secret.description: Masked as `***`, or `null` when you have not configured it.

oauth2_client_id.description: The client identifier Yuno authenticates with.

oauth2_grant_type.description: The grant type Yuno requests the token with.

oauth2_scope.description: The scope Yuno requests the token with.

oauth2_authorization_name.description: The header Yuno sends the token in.

oauth2_include_client_id.description: Whether Yuno also sends the client identifier as a header on the token request.

enrollment_triggers.description: The enrollment events the webhook subscribes to.

payment_triggers.description: The payment events the webhook subscribes to.

report_triggers.description: The report events the webhook subscribes to.

subscription_triggers.description: The subscription events the webhook subscribes to.

onboarding_triggers.description: The onboarding events the webhook subscribes to.

renewal_days.description: How many days before a renewal Yuno sends the `CLOSE_TO_RENEWAL` notification.

created_at.description: The date and time the webhook was created, in ISO 8601.

updated_at.description: The date and time the webhook was last updated, in ISO 8601. It matches `created_at` until you update the webhook for the first time.
